item.description:
What's new in 0.1.28

  • Timed sessions now switch AwakeMate off when the timer ends. Before, if Automatic mode was also armed, a finished timer would quietly fall back to it and keep your Mac awake - now the timer ending turns AwakeMate off and stops tracking, so your Mac is free to sleep. Prefer it to return to the previous mode instead? Turn off "Turn off when a timer ends" in Settings - Options.
